rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the accounting was waived by "heirs," not the co-trustees of the devisee trust, and a notice of hearing should not include a proposed order, as a proposed order is not filed for a hearing, and the proposed order should begin with "Order for Final Distribution." [LRSF 14.67 L.7.f.]
